ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person making the trip */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the person belongs to */,
  "trip_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip (e.g., work, school, shopping) */,
  "trip_num" INTEGER /* Trip number in the tour */,
  "outbound" INTEGER /* Whether the trip is outbound or not */,
  "trip_count" INTEGER /* Number of trips made by the person */,
  "destination" INTEGER /* Destination of the trip */,
  "origin" INTEGER /* Origin of the trip */,
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tour the trip belongs to */,
  "trip_type" TEXT /* Type of trip (e.g., commute, school, shopping) */,
  "destination_weight" REAL /* Weight of the destination */,
  "depart" INTEGER /* Departure time of the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the trip belongs to */,
  "route_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation used for the route */,
  "is_return_trip" INTEGER /* Whether the trip is a return trip */,
  "trip_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation used for the trip */,
  "mode_choice_weight" REAL /* Weight of the mode choice */,
  "parking_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking zone used (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_parking_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("parking_zone_id") REFERENCES parking_zones ("parking_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_trip_mode FOREIGN KEY ("trip_mode") REFERENCES transportation_modes ("mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the person belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the person */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the person */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the person */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the person */,
  "disability" INTEGER /* Whether the person has any disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the household */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the household */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., single, family, shared) */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "num_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles owned by the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transportation mode */,
  "mode_category" TEXT /* Category of the transportation mode (e.g., public, private, shared) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the transportation mode is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_modes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id", "mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_zones" (
  "parking_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the parking zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parking zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
